mission.title: tikv: *: rephrase quickstart section of README
mission.description:
Signed-off-by: tison <wander4096@gmail.com>

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #9937 

Problem Summary:

The quickstart section of README, "Try TiKV", is out of date.

### What is changed and how it works?

Update quickstart section of README.

1. Mention & recommend TiUP
2. Mention running with binaries
3. Link to production-like cluster deployment and how to build from source.

### Release note

- No release note
